questions.question: What is the primary goal of Scenario-Based Modeling?
options: To create a detailed understanding of the system
To identify potential problems and requirements
To design the system architecture
To generate test cases
questions.explanation: Identify potential problems and requirements by describing how the system will be used.

questions.question: What is the purpose of UML Activity Diagrams?
options: To model the external behavior of the system
To model the internal structure of the system
To model the interactions between objects
To model the system's data flows
questions.explanation: Model the interactions between objects and the flow of control between them.

questions.question: Which UML model is used to model the static structure of the system?
options: Use Case
Sequence
Activity
Class Diagram
questions.explanation: Model the structure of the system, including classes, objects, and their relationships.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Use Case Diagram?
options: To model the internal structure of the system
To model the external behavior of the system
To model the interactions between objects
To model the system's data flows
questions.explanation: Model the external behavior of the system, including the interactions between actors and the system.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a Class Diagram?
options: To model the external behavior of the system
To model the internal structure of the system
To model the interactions between objects
To model the system's data flows
questions.explanation: Model the structure of the system, including classes, objects, and their relationships.
